creator: jw@innerewut.de
text:
Please don't commit this patch, use ports/125215 instead.

Thanks,
Jonathan

Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/ruby-gems,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/125491 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/125491
